text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to put away this book. There!
Guess now it's time for the next task.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! I'm helping the school librarian out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The upcoming ticket war is going to be a long and
bloody affair, so I have to do whatever I can to
build up my karma!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, she's trying to increase her luck
for an upcoming ticket raffle.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Digital. Ummm, I-I'm so sorry to bother you,
but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy! Oh, do you have some more work for
me? What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! Actually, there are some
overdue books out that I'd like to get back.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind coming with me to collect them
from the people on this list?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing. Leave all the negotiations to me,
please.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You're a l-lifesaver! Everyone on the list is a
trainer, so I was a bit anxious...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It can be a bit unnerving to deal with adults you
don't know, huh? But I sometimes deal with
strangers while engaging with my pastimes, so I'm
used to it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Let's get going then, yeah? Who's first on the list?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, actually... it's
<username>.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...I had a feeling. All right, Trainer, let's head to
your office.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just, wow. I mean, I kinda expected it, but... your desk space is looking like a new layer of the earth's strata.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Could this be the reason you haven't returned it
yet? I'm sure it's lost somewhere in this pile...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Well, these things happen... Let's clear up this
mess. I'll go get some boxes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right... Book, stationery, trash, book, book,
DVD, book, book, trash, pen, book...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're so fast! Organizing everything by type
without even looking... and without a single
mistake!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, found the library book. But while we're at it,
let's get everything put away into these boxes!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You tidied the place up in the blink of an eye.
You've even organized all the books by category
and stored all the stationery so it's easy to use.
choice_data_list: You're really good at tidying up!
You're really good at tidying up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got a ton of stuff in my room, so I'm really
used to storing books and merch and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep up the pace and go get the books from
the other trainers!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Groan... What is going on in those offices? That was certainly no place to bring Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We're straight up doing archaeological excavations for those overdue books! We managed to tidy things up, but why are all the trainers like that?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
We really cleaned everything up quick. Or, I
mean, you did... I was mostly watching... Sorry
about that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. I was the one who offered to help in the
first place. Plus, this way, I'm racking up tons of
karma.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
K-karma? Still, it looks like we've got a long ways
to go...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I've got to figure something out. If I can't finish everything, my karma's gonna take a hit...
choice_data_list: Let's reduce the time we spend on each person!

All we can do is hunker down and clean each
room properly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. Let's change strategies to just
getting the books back!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
First, let's make some cards requesting everyone
return the books. That'll reduce the time we
spend explaining to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then we'll pass out all the cards to the trainers on
the list. This way, we can split up the work!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Got it! If it's just passing out cards, I think I can
do it without getting too nervous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've already got a handle on each Umamusume's
routine, so that should help me track down their
trainers! Let's get these cards out lickety-split!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
...My bad on being so late returning the book.
That said, it's pretty impressive you managed to
find me in this underpass, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And that was the last one. Wow, we really got
that done quick!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Thank you so much for all of your help,
Digital. I appreciate it, really.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Spending your days working to build up good
karma... You're like a hero! I really look up to
you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! Th-that smile... So bright! Hyuuuuh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I mustn't tell her I was only doing it to improve
my odds at scoring tickets! I can't!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... Merit-making is something I've always
tried to make a habit of...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... Please try not to overwork yourself.
Thanks again for all of your help today. You truly
are a lifesaver!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ha...aaaaagh... Rob Roy's smile... Her genuine
kindness... Aahh, it sets my spirit at ease...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Recharge complete! I've basked in the glory of an
oshi, and I'm back in business!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now I can tackle the rest of the cleaning we put
aside!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Book collection and housekeeping, check and
check! Honestly, there were a few places I
thought would be faster to just burn down and
rebuild from scratch, but I'm glad to be finished!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! You finished the whole list and went back to clean their offices?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Despite how tired you were before, you still
worked your magic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A smile like yours would spring me back to life
countless times!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what a line! You're like the main character
from an Umamusume hero series!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hwah! The way your eyes shine is... s-so cute...
Truly, the greatest reward there is...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Th-this isn't costing me any of my good
karma, is it? It's a freebie, right?!
